message: The sound of the bell rang out through the night.
It was as if even the rooftop itself was resounding in unison.

name: Kimika
message: "This is really amazing, being on the school roof at night!"

name: Kimika
message: "Oh, that's right... It's time for your drugs. Here, my savior!"

name: Takuji
message: "Y-Yeah..."
Kimika gave me a capsule. She had put all the powdered elixir in individual capsules.

name: Kimika
message: "But these capsules are just for you and me."

name: Takuji
message: "Really?"

name: Kimika
message: "Yes, most of the others are taking the stuff mixed with sodium benzoate... That's why they're having sex all the time."

name: Takuji
message: "Sodium benzoate?"

name: Kimika
message: "Most drugs have impurities in them. Sodium benzoate is also called annaka, and if you mix it with stimulants it causes sexual arousal."

name: Takuji
message: "Oh, but I rearranged their molecules with the White Surge, so I don't think it really matters."

name: Kimika
message: "It's for the atmosphere. These capsules are just for us... Just for you and me."

name: Takuji
message: "Just for us, huh..."

name: Kimika
message: "Yes. Here, you'll have to take it without any water."

name: Takuji
message: "You should've brought some."

name: Kimika
message: "Ahahahaha, I forgot."
We put the capsules in our mouths and swallowed.
The holy drug... The holy capsules.

name: Takuji
message: "But still, you know a lot, don't you?"

name: Kimika
message: "Oh, about drugs, you mean? I am the leader of the science club, not to mention a headcase."

name: Takuji
message: "What? A headcase?"

name: Kimika
message: "Oh, that means my brain doesn't work right. That's why I know so much about drugs."

name: Kimika
message: "They gave me a bunch of prescriptions at the hospital, but... I looked up all the ingredients and stuff online. It's sort of my hobby."

name: Takuji
message: "That's kinda creepy."

name: Kimika
message: "Yeah, that's why I wanted to be a security guard when I grew up! That's about the only job I would be able to do right, you know?"

name: Kimika
message: "Or I guess I could be a mad scientist."

name: Takuji
message: "I guess so... I couldn't say."

name: Kimika
message: "The night sky sure is far away."

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah, of course. All the light we can see in the night sky comes from incredibly far away."

name: Kimika
message: "Light from incredibly far away, huh... All the light we're seeing right now came from the shining of stars millions of years ago, huh?"

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah, that's right."

name: Kimika
message: "I'm kinda jealous."

name: Takuji
message: "Jealous?"

name: Kimika
message: "Yeah, my voice only reaches people right next to me... or rather, it doesn't even reach that far. My voice doesn't reach anyone."

name: Kimika
message: "If my voice can't reach anyone near me, then I wish it could at least reach someone millions of light years away."

name: Takuji
message: "Someone millions of light years away..."

name: Kimika
message: "Yeah, that's why I'm jealous of the stars."

name: Takuji
message: "Jealous of the stars... I see."

name: Kimika
message: "That's right! You're the savior! You're like a whole convenience store full of miracles!"

name: Takuji
message: "What, you want me to make you into a star?"

name: Kimika
message: "No way, that's childish! How about this. Make this building reach the heavens?"

name: Takuji
message: "The heavens?"

name: Kimika
message: "Yes! Building C is four stories tall, and we're on the rooftop... We're standing on the fifth floor!"

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah, I guess we are."

name: Kimika
message: "Stretch it out, one floor at a time!"

name: Takuji
message: "Who's gonna do that?"

name: Kimika
message: "You are!"

name: Takuji
message: "You know..."

name: Kimika
message: "I'll give you the signal! Wait for me to hit the fence with this police baton!"

name: Takuji
message: "Hey, wait... Why do you have something like that?"
First knives, and now a police baton... How many weapons does she have?

name: Takuji
message: "You know..."

name: Kimika
message: "Here I go!"

name: Kimika
message: "Whoa..."
The pole she hit twisted and broke.
Then a beautiful sound rang out, accompanied by a sudden light, as if she had cast a magic spell.

name: Kimika
message: "Nice job, my savior!"

name: Takuji
message: "Eh?"
Suddenly, the building was five stories tall.
It looks like I actually made a miracle happen when she gave the signal.

name: Kimika
message: "What an amazing miracle! I knew you could do it, my savior! Here goes the next one!"
Kimika sacrificed another part of the fence.
It broke and released its magic.
At the same time, I made another miracle.

name: Takuji
message: "Ha!"

name: Kimika
message: "Six stories! Let's go the edges of space, my savior!"

name: Kimika
message: "There!"

name: Takuji
message: "Ah!"

name: Kimika
message: "Ha!"

name: Takuji
message: "There!"
She broke one after the other.
Each time she hit a piece of the fence, it broke and changed into sound.
Everything broke and changed into sound.

name: Kimika
message: "Amazing!"

name: Takuji
message: "Hehehe..."

name: Kimika
message: "The sound, the sound!"

name: Takuji
message: "Hahahahahaha..."
The world broke apart.
Kimika cheerfully swung her baton around.
She swung it in a set rhythm, almost like a conductor.
I matched her pace as I brought about more and more miracles.
The savior's miracle.
Building renovation!
Kimika changed matter to sound.
And I changed sound to matter.
The roof stretched up to the sky.
Stretched, stretched, stretched on upward.

name: Kimika
message: "This is music!"

name: Takuji
message: "Hahaha... I think all the real musicians in the world would take offense at that."

name: Takuji
message: "You're just making stuff up."

name: Kimika
message: "Even if I'm making it up, it's still beautiful! This melody is extremely beautiful!"

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah, you're right."
The sound of destruction had changed into a beautiful melody.

name: Kimika
message: "Ahahahahaha, it's a melody!"
For some reason she had a scale in her other hand, which she held up above her head.

name: Takuji
message: "Hahahahahaha... You're so stupid. Why do you have a scale?"

name: Kimika
message: "Ahahaha, I'm measuring the weight of God! That's why I have a scale!"
She held the scale up toward the sky as she said that.

name: Kimika
message: "Come on, God, get on the scale! We already have the melody on the other side."

name: Kimika
message: "It's the melody! I'm in charge of the melody, and you're in charge of the miracles!"

name: Kimika
message: "Come on, God, right here. Sit on this scale!"

name: Takuji
message: "Hahahaha, what kind of combination is that. Why are we putting melody and miracles together?"

name: Kimika
message: "It makes perfect sense. God is the melody!"

name: Kimika
message: "God is melody!"

name: Kimika
message: "I just understood it! God is melody!"

name: Takuji
message: "Why, you... Did you hear me at all? You're just making stuff up at this point."

name: Kimika
message: "Now, let's go even higher!"
We were already above the clouds.
It already stood far above any other building on the planet.
Like the Tower of Babel.
I had to wonder if God would be angry at me for using my miracles like this.

name: Takuji
message: "Hey, wait, this is like the Tower of Babel.

name: Kimika
message: "Or maybe Icarus!"

name: Takuji
message: "Icarus?"

name: Kimika
message: "Yeah, it's the story of a man who tried to fly to the sun with wings of wax."

name: Takuji
message: "What happened at the end?"

name: Kimika
message: "He fell and died, ahahahahahaha!"

name: Kimika
message: "Icarus was stupid. He didn't notice his wings melting when he got close to the sun."

name: Kimika
message: "But we won't lose! I have the savior with me, after all!"

name: Kimika
message: "Keep going. We'll reach the sky!"

name: Takuji
message: "I don't know about that. You'll probably get killed by God."

name: Kimika
message: "If that bastard thinks he's got it in him, then he's welcome to try!"

name: Kimika
message: "Because I think..."

name: Kimika
message: "If God existed, he would be looking down at us from the sky all the time."

name: Kimika
message: "He would see everything. He would know everything about us..."

name: Kimika
message: "And that's nasty! I don't want some guy leering at me all the time!"

name: Takuji
message: "You better hope he doesn't take offense to that."

name: Kimika
message: "Ahahahahaha..."
Naturally, her baton was bent in several places
But she was laughing cheerfully.
She laughed as she destroyed the fence.
Destruction and melody.
Baton and music.

name: Kimika
message: "This is music!"

name: Kimika
message: "Ahahahahaha!"
She completely broke the end of the baton off, but that didn't stop the beautiful melody.
The melody enveloped the roof, and it enveloped the two of us.

name: Takuji
message: "Hahahahaha..."
The miracles continued with every note.
We reached the height of the moon.

name: Kimika
message: "The moon. The moon. Luna!"

name: Takuji
message: "Hahahahahaha..."
The endless succession of notes.
The endless succession of miracles.
We approached the edge of space.

name: Kimika
message: "O-Oh no!"

name: Takuji
message: "What's wrong?"

name: Kimika
message: "The building is so tall... The centrifugal forces are making the roof spin incredibly fast!"

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah, since the earth is revolving on its axis."

name: Kimika
message: "Hahahahahaha... Oh no, oh no!"

name: Takuji
message: "You're having an awful lot of fun!"

name: Kimika
message: "Of course I am! This is super fun!"

name: Kimika
message: "Ah!"
Kimika yelled even louder than she had before.

name: Kimika
message: "A cow!"

name: Takuji
message: "Huh?"

name: Kimika
message: "There are tons of cows!"

name: Takuji
message: "Eh?"
I didn't notice until she said something... the roof was overflowing with cows.

name: Takuji
message: "Wh-Why are there cows here?"

name: Kimika
message: "Why wouldn't there be? You were the one who said there were cows on the roof!"

name: Takuji
message: "Cows on the roof?!"
The cows mooed.
The melody rang out.
We were deep in space, far from the earth.

name: Kimika
message: "This is the first time I've seen a cow. They're huge, and they dance!"

name: Takuji
message: "Dancing cows?"
When I looked again, they really were dancing.
They were on their hind legs, dancing.

name: Kimika
message: "They're dancing. Dance, dance."

name: Kimika
message: "This is the uncaged dance!"

name: Takuji
message: "Uncaged dance?"

name: Kimika
message: "Yes! We've left the influence of Earth's gravity. Everything is free from gravity!"

name: Kimika
message: "This is the world's first uncaged dance, ahahahaha!"
The uncaged dance.
We're far from any source of gravity... We're dancing in the furthest reaches of the starry sky.
That certainly would be mankind's first zero gravity dance.

name: Kimika
message: "It's a zero gravity dance!"
Kimika's body floated in the air.
She danced wildly through the air.

name: Takuji
message: "Dummy. If you fly through the air like that, everyone can see your panties."

name: Kimika
message: "That's fine! You're the only one who can see!"

name: Takuji
message: "Have some shame!"

name: Kimika
message: "Ahahahahaha! I have some shame. I'm a virgin, after all. I've never even kissed anyone!"

name: Kimika
message: "I don't care if you can see my panties. It's just cloth. It's not like you can see my cunt!"

name: Takuji
message: "Don't say that word!"

name: Kimika
message: "Ahaha, cunt, cunt, cunt! I'll say it as many times as I want! Whoever wants to tell me that word is bad can go eat shit!"

name: Takuji
message: "That's ridiculous!"
A zero gravity dance.
A herd of cows.
The twinkling stars.
Kimika danced.
She danced and danced and danced in space.
I danced too.
God doesn't matter.
I just danced.
I danced for the pleasure of it.
I danced because it was fun.

name: Kimika
message: "Life is suffering! It's like an Unhappy Meal! But it's the best! Life is the best! That's important!"

name: Kimika
message: "Ahaha, what comes with the Unhappy Meal, my savior?"

name: Takuji
message: "Nothing comes with it."

name: Kimika
message: "That's not true! There's a bonus that comes with it! There's an Unhappy bonus that all the kids love!"

name: Takuji
message: "That sounds like it would taste terrible."

name: Kimika
message: "Now then, what is it? Go ahead, open it! What came with today's Unhappy Meal?"

name: Takuji
message: "What am I supposed to open?"

name: Kimika
message: "It's right there. Look! Right before your eyes!"

name: Takuji
message: "Oh, you're right."

name: Kimika
message: "Ahahahahaha, you don't know the story of Tyltyl and Mytyl! That's no good, my savior!"

name: Takuji
message: "Why would you bring that up?"

name: Kimika
message: "Tyltyl and Mytyl went on a journey around the world to search for the blue bird who was part of the Unhappy Meal! They even went to the edge of space and rode the Galactic Railroad!"

name: Kimika
message: "The conductor's here! The Birdcatcher told us that this ticket will take us higher than the sky!"

name: Kimika
message: "It's Eagle Station! Look, it's Scorpio's Fire! We've already passed through the Centaur Village! It's the Southern Cross!"

name: Kimika
message: "It's Tanabata! It's the night of Tanabata... and the savior and I are on the Weather Station Pillar!"

name: Kimika
message: "Because there's nowhere we belong. On Tanabata night... there's nowhere for us!"

name: Kimika
message: "That's why the blue bird fled to the Milky Way... so, so far away!"

name: Kimika
message: "But the blue bird that thought he got away..."

name: Kimika
message: "Was on the menu the next morning."

name: Kimika
message: "So please open your Unhappy Meal's toy!"

name: Takuji
message: "I don't understand what you're saying!"

name: Kimika
message: "Ahahahahaha... There's nothing to understand! It's the flow. It's music. Come on, open it."

name: Kimika
message: "My savior, open it, open it, open it. I want to see it. I want to see you open it!"

name: Takuji
message: "Jeez... I guess I might as well."
The mysterious box that appeared in front of me...
It had 'Amazonu' written on it.
Where did this come from?
I reluctantly opened the box.
Kimika eagerly watched me.
Is this going to be unhappy too?

name: Takuji
message: "Whoa!"

name: Kimika
message: "Ah!"
It shot iridescent sparks in every direction... and then right above our heads...
A beautiful explosion of color.

name: Kimika
message: "Whoa!"
The box shot out more and more polychromatic sparks... and each one exploded above us.

name: Kimika
message: "Oh, so that's it..."

name: Takuji
message: "What?"

name: Kimika
message: "I think I just solved one of the riddles from my childhood."

name: Takuji
message: "What do you mean?"

name: Kimika
message: "I always wondered what would it look like if you saw a skyrocket from directly underneath."

name: Kimika
message: "Would it be flat, or round... What would it look like from underneath..."

name: Takuji
message: "Well, it's round, of course..."

name: Kimika
message: "Nope, you're wrong!"

name: Kimika
message: "If you look at it from directly underneath, it's a perfect circle!"

name: Kimika
message: "More perfect than the world!"

name: Kimika
message: "Than the universe!"

name: Kimika
message: "A perfect circle!"
The fireworks went on forever.
The lights lit up the world.
The world's final eve.
Kimika danced.
And so did I.
So did the cows, the world, the gods, and everything else.
We danced, and danced, and danced, and then the eve ended.
Tomorrow would be the last day.
Before we realized it, we had come to the edge of the universe.
We had come to the edge of the world.

name: Kimika
message: "This is the edge of the universe..."

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah... This is the edge."

name: Kimika
message: "Oh, this is the last stop."

name: Takuji
message: "The last stop..."
Kimika said those lonesome words as we stood under the final sky.
We finally made it.
The world's limit.
The edge of the universe.
Our limit.
This is the sky of the end.
It was already evening.
I thought it was morning, but now it was starting to get dark.

name: Kimika
message: "Oh, we fell asleep, didn't we..."

name: Takuji
message: "I'm surprised we got any sleep up here, in the middle of summer..."

name: Kimika
message: "Oh, I carried you over to the shade during the day."

name: Takuji
message: "I didn't notice at all."

name: Kimika
message: "Neither of us had slept at all... I guess we just collapsed."

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah..."

name: Kimika
message: "Hey, my savior..."

name: Takuji
message: "What?"

name: Kimika
message: "Is this the End Sky?"

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah, that's right... This is the End Sky. The last sky in this world."

name: Kimika
message: "Oh, good."

name: Kimika
message: "Just like I thought..."

name: Takuji
message: "What?"

name: Kimika
message: "Just like I thought... Neither of them change. Not the last sky, and not the usual sky."

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah... That's right."

name: Kimika
message: "Just because it's over... doesn't mean it's special, does it?"

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah..."

name: Kimika
message: "But the setting sun is always beautiful, no matter when."

name: Kimika
message: "The setting sun at the end of the world, and the setting sun after any other day. They're both just as beautiful... It's so beautiful."

name: Kimika
message: "Now then, my savior..."

name: Takuji
message: "What?"

name: Kimika
message: "There's nothing that we've forgotten, is there?"

name: Takuji
message: "Forgotten?"

name: Kimika
message: "Yes, there's nothing left for us to do here..."

name: Takuji
message: "Forgotten..."

name: Takuji
message: "Does anything come to mind for you?"

name: Kimika
message: "No, I looked at the sky and thought about it for so long, but I haven't forgotten anything."

name: Takuji
message: "And?"

name: Kimika
message: "I just thought... if I've forgotten it, maybe it wasn't that important after all..."

name: Kimika
message: "I guess I didn't need it."

name: Takuji
message: "Didn't need it, huh..."

name: Kimika
message: "Yep, it wasn't necessary. Though the truth is, I doubt that anything is really unnecessary."

name: Kimika
message: "But if nothing is necessary, then it's the same as if everything is."

name: Kimika
message: "So... we have to draw a line somewhere."

name: Kimika
message: "If I've forgotten something, then that's fine."

name: Kimika
message: "There's nothing I've forgotten."

name: Takuji
message: "Something you've forgotten, huh?"

name: Kimika
message: "Yes! Things that were incredibly unhappy... and things that were happy too... All of it."

name: Kimika
message: "Hahahahahaha... Well, let's go."

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah, let's... The sun is setting... and then..."

name: Kimika
message: "The last night..."

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah."

name: Kimika
message: "Let's enjoy it!"

name: Takuji
message: "No, today should be more solemn."

name: Kimika
message: "No way. I want to have fun on the last night. Please, spend the last night together with me..."

name: Takuji
message: "Um, Kimika... The holy water..."

name: Kimika
message: "Right, I'll sprinkle lots of LSD on them at the end. And the stimulants too!"

name: Takuji
message: "Like I said, I turned the LSD into holy water and the stimulants into elixir."

name: Kimika
message: "Oh, I misspoke! That's right, that's right!"
I kind of wonder...
What was she trying to accomplish?
I feel like she only went along with what I was doing to accomplish her own objectives.
What a strange woman.
Well, it doesn't matter.

name: Kimika
message: "We'll give them a ton of it for the finale!"

name: Kimika
message: "Oh～! I'm getting pumped up!"
Everyone was gathered.
How many people are there? And when did they all get here...
It looks like they were having a lot of fun.
Like they're all excited for something.
I wonder if the ark is fun...
I thought salvation would be a more solemn affair.
I thought saving people would be more serious. I'm sure it should've felt more religious.
But in reality, it's like this.
I gathered them all through fear... They all came here out of fear of the curse.
They gathered to escape their fear of death.
So why are they having so much fun?
Returning to the sky... It truly is something wonderful, but it should be more religious, more serious.
But instead, everyone is laughing.
Frolicking.
The world's final day is coming.
Everyone is celebrating.
I spoke.
Of the three monsters born of the gods...
Of the great wolf, Fenrir, who is human lust itself.
Of the god of Death Hel, who is human fear of death itself.
And of Jormungandr, significant of eternity, who will awaken on the world's final day.
Everyone listened eagerly.
Like children reading a picture book... they eagerly listened to the story of the world's final day.
Rather than fear, it was enthusiasm I saw in their eyes.
Rather than quivering, laughter.
Rather than despair, amusement.
They all seemed so happy.
They all seemed so eager.
Laughing and screaming.
I yelled!
Dance!
Dance!
Dance!
With the melody!
Dance!
The world is words!
God is melody!
We have no need for the world.
We need only the melody.
Everyone danced.
Joyfully danced.
Danced as if mad.
There was no trace of gravity or solemnity.
I thought once more about whether I had anything left to do here.
Nothing...
There's nothing for me to do here.
I haven't forgotten anything.
One more spoke.
We have the melody, do we not?
The melody is here.
So we have no need for the world.
We have no need for words.
There's nothing we've forgotten...
After all, we've forgotten it...
The bell rang.
Today began.
